title: pneumatopteris regis
intro: Pneumatopteris regis, also known as the royal fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and protect against infections. The health benefits of Pneumatopteris regis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Pneumatopteris regis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to the affected area.
